whatsappMessage: Hi AMB Delights, I'd like to order
deliveryArea: Add your delivery area, e.g. Nashik city + 5km
hours: Add your hours, e.g. 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM, all days
deliveryPlatforms: Add Zomato / Swiggy links if listed
aboutBody1: Replace this with your real story — how AMB Delights started, what your food is known for, and why you run as a delivery-only kitchen.
aboutBody2: We put our energy into the food and the packaging that gets it to you fresh, instead of a dining room you'll never sit in. That's how we keep prices fair and quality high.
